productDisplayName: Belkin Unisex Pace Tall Messenger Black Netbook Bag
description: Carry your netbook in absolute style and comfort with the Pace Tall Messenger from belkin. Laptop size: 10.2" Made of polyester and waxed canvas for waterproofing One main zippered compartment with a padded laptop sleeve and organiser space One zippered pouch on the front One velcro closure pouch at the back Adjustable and removable shoulder strap One elasticated mobile pouch Haul loop for handling ease Care Hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent
